news_feed.title: For the First Time Ever, Your Native BTC Can Buy Stocks
news_feed.summary: Trade real-world stocks directly from your Bitcoin wallet. Starting with $CRCLx, $TSLAx, $NVDAx, $MSTRx, $COINx — and more to come. Powered by Sodax × xStocks.

news_feed.title: What's Shipping Next on Bound
news_feed.summary: xStocks integration, email + wallet sign-in, a custom Ordinal Indexer, better swap tracking, and a referral program that pays you 10% of Bound's revenue.

news_feed.title: Bound Now Speaks Chinese
news_feed.summary: The Bound app now supports a full Chinese language interface. All DeFi features — swaps, loans, Ordinals — available in Chinese on app.bound.exchange.

news_feed.title: Ordinals on Bound, Powered by Satflow
news_feed.summary: Buy, sell, and trade Bitcoin Ordinals directly from your self-custodial Bound account — no bridges, no intermediaries. Available now at app.bound.exchange/ordinals.

news_feed.title: One Account for All Your Bitcoin Activity
news_feed.summary: Your Bitcoin setup shouldn't need a flowchart. Invest, borrow, swap, and earn from a single self-custodial account — no bridges, no juggling wallets.

news_feed.title: No Liquidation. Ever. Keep Your Stack.
news_feed.summary: If BTC dips, walk away and keep the cash. If it moons, pay back and keep your stack. Fixed-rate, fixed-term BTC loans with no liquidations and no margin calls.

news_feed.title: Bitcoin Dropped 30%. Every BTC Loan Platform Liquidated Their Borrowers.
news_feed.summary: They sold the collateral, kept the proceeds, and sent borrowers a receipt. Legal. Expected. Baked into the architecture. Here's why Bound was built differently.
